title: Families at Helmer; women "shut-in" on homesteads; buttermilk and clabber milk
description: Families at Helmer. Women "shut-in" on homesteads; she relieves a woman so she can go visiting. Spilling buttermilk; buttermilk and clabber milk.

title: Sister rejected offer from the Felts; Felts family struggle; Hampton Felts' death; Mrs. Felts hiked to Bovill and back for groceries
description: Sister rejected an offer of "smear case" from the Felts. Felts family struggle - his poor health, her work. House raising for the Felts pleasure of gatherings and helping others. Hampton Felts' death; his wife's decision to return to Indiana. She bought some of Mrs. Felts' things to set up housekeeping, until they had their own start. Mrs. Felts' hiked to Bovill and back for groceries with a baby on her back. Her extraordinary stamina.

title: Meeting Mrs. Felts; Wood family didn't have a horse team; near injury while trying to lead a horse
description: First meeting Mrs. Felts, when the Wood sled overturned on their way to the homestead. Mrs. Felts' coughing made her think she was sick. Wood family got by without a horse team. Father rented team to build road. Her near injury trying to lead horse while father was building bridge. Millers took grocery list into Helmer for homesteaders.

title: County roads and homesteaders' roads; sister almost chopped her finger off; making shakes; preparing homestead
description: County road and homesteaders' roads. The whole family were "men" helping on the road building. Sister nearly chopped finger off. Making shakes. Preparation of homestead to live on; stayed in the meanwhile at Millers'.

title: Helping father build; mother's nearly fatal miscarriage
description: Helping father build. Mother was upset by Hallenback children's lack of cleanliness when the family stayed with them. Mother's nearly fatal miscarriage on the homestead, while father was gone. She disobeyed orders to get message to a neighbor, who rode into town and sent for doctor.

title: PLaying circus; stopping at Stockwell halfway house
description: Playing circus, a game with cards. Stopping at Stockwell halfway house near Deary.

title: Agnes Liner shot by Jess Dillman
description: Jess Dillman shot Agnes Liner when she refused to submit to him. Mother wouldn't let her go alone with such a man.
